rationale: P0 coverage is 70% (7/10 fully covered; required: 100%). No P0 criterion has zero coverage, but three fall short of FULL: 1.6-AC1 (401/403-to-failed timing unverified), 1.6-AC2 (tenant-isolation negative path untested), and 1.2-AC1 (repo-scope OAuth request asserted only by a test skipped without AUTH_GITHUB_ID). Overall coverage (77%) also falls below the 80% minimum independently.
